sidebar.switchError: Unable to switch workspace. Please try again.

sync_wizard.title: Connect & Sync
sync_wizard.description: Connect your Airtable base and choose which tables to sync.
sync_wizard.step1_description: Connect your Airtable account to get started. A popup will open for you to authorize access.
sync_wizard.step2_description: Choose which Airtable base you'd like to sync with this workspace.
sync_wizard.no_bases: No bases found. Make sure your Airtable account has at least one base.
sync_wizard.step3_description: Select the tables to sync and optionally add filters to limit which records are imported.
sync_wizard.quota_exceeded: The selected tables exceed your plan's record quota. Remove tables or add filters to reduce the count.
sync_wizard.large_table_warning: This table has over 10,000 records. Consider adding filters to reduce sync time.
sync_wizard.sync_started: Sync started successfully. Records will appear as they are imported.
sync_wizard.error_load_bases: Failed to load bases. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_load_tables: Failed to load tables. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_start_sync: Failed to start sync. Please try again.
sync_wizard.error_quota_check: Failed to check quota. Please try again.

sync_filter_editor.quota_exceeded: This filter would exceed your record quota by {overage} records.
sync_filter_editor.save_error: Failed to save filter. Please try again.
sync_filter_editor.no_filter: No filter applied — syncing all records.

sync_orphans.banner_message: {count, plural, one {# record} other {# records}} no longer match your sync filter. These records exist in EveryStack but are no longer being synced from Airtable. They won't receive updates.
sync_orphans.row_indicator_tooltip: This record is no longer synced — it was excluded by a sync filter change on {date}.
sync_orphans.filtered_out_tooltip: This record exists on {platform} but is outside your sync filter.

sync_conflicts.title_multi: {count, plural, one {# Conflict} other {# Conflicts}} on "{record}"
sync_conflicts.description: This record was edited both in EveryStack and on the source platform. Choose which value to keep for each field.
sync_conflicts.pending_count: {count, plural, one {# conflict pending} other {# conflicts pending}}
sync_conflicts.resolve_error: Failed to resolve conflict. Please try again.
sync_conflicts.cell_tooltip: Conflict: edited both locally and on {platform}. Click to resolve.
sync_conflicts.toolbar_badge_readonly: {count, plural, one {# conflict} other {# conflicts}} (pending resolution)
sync_conflicts.row_badge_tooltip: This row has {count, plural, one {# conflict} other {# conflicts}}. Click to resolve.
sync_conflicts.team_member_tooltip: This field has a sync conflict. A Manager will resolve it.
sync_conflicts.bulk_resolve_record_success: All conflicts on this record resolved.
sync_conflicts.bulk_resolve_table_success: All conflicts in this table resolved.
